de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang

Class WellDefinednessCheck.POTerms

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.WellDefinednessCheck.POTerms
  • Enclosing class:
    WellDefinednessCheck

    public static final class WellDefinednessCheck.POTerms
extends java.lang.Object
    A data structure for storing and passing all specifications of a specification element includinf pre- and post-condition, an assignable-clause and a list of all other clauses specified.
